title: VS Code: status bar progress for LSP and pckg operations

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
VS Code: status bar progress for LSP and pckg operations

## Landed (v0.4)

- Status bar shows LSP lifecycle, workspace scan, and pckg CLI activity (v0.3 baseline)
- Persistent pckg registry connection health on status bar (`$(check)` / `$(warning) pckg`) with tooltip detail
- Sidebar Packages view retains full connection label; status bar mirrors health after probe/refresh

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** Done

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `vscode-editor`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-vscode-pckg-docs`
